THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT A CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUFFIN, LAKISHA WILLIAMS, LEONARD $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,620.00, JUDGMENT IS FOR VALUE OF TV & DVD PLAYER THAT ARE THE SUBJECT OF THIS CONTRACT AND ACTION.
